title: aurinia saxatilis
intro: Aurinia saxatilis, also known as mountain cornflower or rock jasmine, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Aurinia saxatilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
